title: EHS Engineer
description:
Job Responsibilities

Environmental Strategy and Compliance

  • Supports and execute the implementation of EHS strategies and initiatives that align with the overall business strategy/ plan.
  • Manage site’s EHS protocols; including fire safety matters to the requirements of site & corporate directives, local legislations and other requirements (i.e. REACH, RoHS, Conflict of Minerals, OHSA and etc.)
  • Follow up mandatory notifications with regards to licenses/ permits and relevant WSH reports (i.e. iReporting, Medical Examinations submissions etc.) to ensure compliance with relevant legal regulations related to our factory operations.
  • Implement operational management practices in line with ISO14001/ 45001 standards, including document management, record storage, and emergency response.

Consultant and Government Coordination

  • Select and collaborate with EHS consultants as needed.
  • Support on-time renewal of all licenses and permit without any lapse.
  • Aggregate and report environmental impact data in accordance to ISO14001 Standards and Corporate Directives.
  • Sustenance of EHS rules and regulations with respect to the additions, changes and reviews by local mandatory Agencies for compliance and governance.
  • Manage incident reports and ensure follow-up actions (reactive/preventive) are implemented.
  • Manage EHS documentation and ensure up-to-date reviews.
  • Respond to EHS-related questionnaires from customers and government agencies.

Environmental Health and Safety Facilities Management

  • Oversee the management of EHS facilities, including renewable energy installations.
  • Develop specifications, request price quotes, and prepare proposal documents for EHS projects.
  • Supervise addition/ alteration works within the facility, with regards to safety and health management, inspections and audits.
  • Organize monthly EHS committee meeting and EHS inspections
  • Develop and conduct EHS&F trainings, liaise training schedule with operations team and facilitate trainings as required.

Industrial Waste Management

  • Manage operations related to industrial waste, ensuring proper handling and disposal.

EHS Policies and ESG Initiatives

  • Collaborate, Develop and implement essential Environmental, Health, and Safety (EHS) policies and procedures to meet regulatory and industry standards.
  • Supports the Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) initiatives, focusing on sustainability projects and reporting.

International Collaboration and Risk Management

  • Collaborate with international factory teams to conduct risk assessments, improve emergency response protocols, and investigate incidents to prevent future occurrences.  
  • Lead and manage Risk Assessment (RA) teams; including reviewing, control and maintenance of RA reports.
  • Support the operations in identifying, assessing any foreseeable risk arising from the workplace or process, risk management and consulting.

Project and Mechanical Improvement Management

  • Oversee project management for new buildings and facilities, including redevelopment projects.
  • Implement mechanical improvement projects by planning, procuring contracts, and executing upgrades to mechanical services infrastructure in a safe, efficient, and cost-effective manner.
  • Manage contractors undertaking new and/ or improvement projects and maintenance/service term contractors. This shall include the monitoring of the contractor’s performance and administration from start till the completion of work.
  • Handle and manage contractors, and their deliverables according to requirements, approved quotation &/or agreement.
  • Any other projects/task as assigned by their Manager, from time to time.

Job Requirements

Professional Qualifications:

  • Relevant Diploma/ Degree in Environment, Workplace Safety & Health or equivalent
  • Registered WSHO with the Ministry of Manpower
  • Registered ECO with the National Environment Agency
  • Certified FSM by the Singapore Civil Defence Force
  • Possesses 3-5 years of experience in EHS management, particularly on the essential practices with regards to manufacturing operations, equipment and chemical management.
  • Ability to work well with various departments; demonstrating relevant knowledge in EHS Operational controls.

Specialized Knowledge & Skills:

  • Experienced in communicating and negotiating with government agencies.
  • Strong knowledge of local environmental, health and safety legislations and other regulatory practices (i.e. OSHA, REACH, RoHS and Conflict of Minerals.
  • Familiar with ISO14001/ISO45001 standards, RBA and internal auditing.
  • Experienced in facility installation, start-up, and management of building and utility construction projects.
  • Experienced in working within multinational corporations (MNCs) is an advantage.

Competencies:

  • Exceptional project management skills with the capability to lead, plan, and execute complex environmental management initiatives.
  • Strong environmental management expertise, with keen attention to detail and robust analytical, evaluative, and research skills.
  • Proficient in coordinating with vendors and facilitating negotiations.
  • Demonstrated leadership ability to influence and guide others regarding company policies, practices, and processes.
  • Proven ability to work meticulously and with precision.
  • Skilled in developing and integrating metrics to clearly showcase the value of EHS initiatives to the business.　　　　　　　　　                         

Attributes:

  • Excellent interpersonal and communication skills, enabling effective liaison, cooperation, and influence with multiple stakeholders.
  • Global mindset with comfort in working across diverse cultural backgrounds.
  • Genuine and sincere personality.      

Others:

  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills with strong proficiency in English.
  • Proficiency in Japanese is a plus, facilitating communication with Japanese stakeholders.

postedCompany.description:
Company Name: ADVANCED SUBSTRATE TECHNOLOGIES PTE. LTD.
Plant Address: 9 Pesawat Drive, Singapore 619607

Established in 2023, Advanced Substrate Technologies (AST) is a member of the TOPPAN Group, a global leader in integrated printing solutions.
Located in Singapore, a global semiconductor hub, AST plays a pivotal role in shaping the forefront of the cutting-edge semiconductor ecosystem.
AST specialises in the development, manufacturing, and sale of high-density semiconductor packages, such as FC-BGA, along with related components.


This strategic focus is a response to the growing demand for cutting-edge solutions for the data centre servers and the AI-related applications.
True to our name, AST is committed to delivering state-of-the-art technology integrated into its substrate products, with plans to commence mass production in 2027.


Join us on our journey to advance semiconductor innovation and become a part of our exceptional team. Your future with AST awaits.
postedCompany.name: ADVANCED SUBSTRATE TECHNOLOGIES PTE. LTD.
